title: Samsung’s new laptop OLED hits 1,600 nits and lasts twice as long as the panel it replaces
summary: Samsung Display is shipping tandem OLED laptop panels reaching 1,600 nits peak brightness, 40% above single-stack OLED, with twice the lifespan. Samsung says the tandem panel lasts more than twice as long as a single-stack OLED under typical laptop operating brightness.
caption: output/2026-07-20/samsung-s-new-laptop-oled-hits-1-600-nits-and-lasts-twice-as-long-as-t.txt
